caption: A man with short dark hair wears black over-ear headphones and a dark grey shirt while positioned in front of a professional microphone. He is set against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam background. In the foreground, a smaller rectangular video window is overlaid on the screen. This inner video displays a wide shot of a rocky coastline under a pale sky. In the first three frames, the text "PERFECT FOR WHEREVER" is superimposed over the coastal scene. The man in the main frame looks toward the inner video with a slight smile, shifting his gaze and expression slightly across the sequence. In the final frame, the text disappears from the inner video, revealing a group of people sitting together on the rocks, facing away from the camera and looking toward the horizon.
